_meta.notes: Smelting trainer. Found at iron-reach (separate workshop from Halrik). Teaches the patience of coaxing metal out of stone.

tagline: soot-faced, narrow, eyes always slightly closed against the heat.

behavior.default: feeds the furnace, watches the color change in the metal
narrativeHooks: Vassi knows when the iron is ready by the sound, not the look.
He has worked one furnace for forty years. It knows him.

teachingLines: The metal wants to come out. Just don't rush it.
